## Checklist

- [ ] Tests written first and cover the behavior change
      (`cargo test -p otori-core` / `pnpm vitest run`)
- [ ] CLI contract changes update AGENTS.md and pass
      `scripts/acceptance.sh`
- [ ] New write paths record provenance and respect curated fields
- [ ] Commit messages follow the convention in CONTRIBUTING.md
